name: libio-all-lwp-perl
title: libio-all-lwp-perl
summary: Perl module to use HTTP and FTP URLs with IO::All
description:
Perl module to use HTTP and FTP URLs with IO::All
IO::All::LWP acts as glue between IO::All and LWP, so that files can
be read and written through the network using the convenient IO:All
interface. Note that this module is not used directly: you just use
IO::All, which knows when to autoload IO::All::HTTP, IO::All::HTTPS,
IO::All::FTP, or IO::All::Gopher, which implement the specific
protocols based on IO::All::LWP.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libio-all-lwp-perl because Perl module to use HTTP and FTP URLs with IO::All.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libio-all-lwp-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libio-all-lwp-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libio-all-lwp-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
